ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "work_class_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the work_classes table */,
  "final_weight" REAL /* Final weight for the individual based on survey methodology */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the educational_levels table */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of education level */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the marital_statuses table */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the occupations table */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the races table */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sexes table */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains earned by the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses incurred by the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" REAL /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the native_countries table */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the income_brackets table */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the individual's job */,
  "job_satisfaction" TEXT /* Job satisfaction level of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the individual */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educational_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_work_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("work_class_id") REFERENCES work_classes ("work_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "work_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "work_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the education level */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the bracket */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the individual data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was submitted */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., data download, report generation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request that generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request that generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, data access, report generation) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
